overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player character walks along sidewalks beneath elevated highways, crosses a large intersection with yellow grid markings, and enters a covered shopping arcade, passing various pedestrians and vehicles in a futuristic urban environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing pedestrians and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt standing near the building wall

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure overhead with support beams
rusted metal railing separating sidewalk from the street below
modern building with green-tinted glass windows and illuminated interior
large glowing digital advertisements on building facades
tall street lamp casting bright light through the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway in a cyberpunk city at night. The player walks forward along the concrete path, passing a metal railing on the right and a glass office building with green-tinted windows on the left. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and neon billboards glow in the distance through the rainy, foggy atmosphere.

events.description: exiting the covered sidewalk area and approaching the open intersection with crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk and beginning to cross the street, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking ahead toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
floating hexagonal advertisement hologram above the intersection
large wall covered with multiple digital screens displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered sidewalk and approaches a wide intersection. The metal railing and glass building fall behind as crosswalk stripes and a traffic light pole come into view. A holographic floating sign hovers above the intersection, and digital billboards line the left side. The player begins crossing the road as the scene opens up to the rainy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with yellow grid markings

events.description: breaking into a run to cross the wide intersection quickly
black sports car drives through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: running across the wide intersection while looking around at traffic and surrounding billboards

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large intersection marked with yellow grid lines and wait markings
tall building with illuminated 'CANT FEED' signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The player runs across the expansive intersection marked with yellow grid patterns. Vehicles including a black sports car pass through the crossing. The 'CANT FEED' building sign becomes visible in the distance, while the holographic sign shifts to the left as the player moves. The wide-open space exposes the rainy night sky and surrounding neon-lit towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with construction barriers and digital advertising

events.description: entering street section lined with red and white construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past construction barriers and large digital billboards

entered.detail: red and white striped construction barriers lining the sidewalk edge
massive curved digital screen displaying colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the player walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with red and white construction barriers on the left. Large digital billboards dominate the right side, displaying vibrant advertisements. The 'CANT FEED' building sign moves to the left as the player progresses down the street, passing parked vehicles and neon-lit storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping arcade with neon signage

events.description: entering the covered pedestrian arcade with shops and cafes

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered arcade area with shops and neon signs, passing other pedestrians browsing storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian browsing near a shop entrance with neon lighting

entered.detail: entrance to covered pedestrian walkway with overhead protection
bright orange neon sign for a cafe above the entrance

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered pedestrian arcade, leaving the exposed street behind. The environment becomes more enclosed with a roof overhead, providing shelter from the rain. Bright neon signs including a prominent orange cafe sign illuminate the walkway, while shop windows line the right side. The crowd density increases slightly as pedestrians browse the storefronts in this commercial walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban corridor into a wide, rain-slicked city intersection. It begins on a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, moving past a glass office building with green-tinted windows and sparse pedestrians amidst a foggy, neon-lit atmosphere. As the player exits the cover of the highway, the scene opens up to the rainy night sky, leaving the metal railings behind to approach a wide crossing marked by holographic signs and digital billboards. The camera then expands across the expansive intersection, gliding over yellow grid patterns and passing a black sports car before finally revealing the distant CANT FEED building sign beneath the glow of surrounding neon towers.

The shot follows a continuous movement from an open, rain-slicked commercial street into the sheltered confines of a neon-lit pedestrian arcade. It begins with the player walking along a sidewalk lined with red and white construction barriers, while vibrant digital billboards and the CANT FEED sign drift past on the right. As the camera progresses past parked vehicles and glowing storefronts, the open city street gradually gives way to a covered walkway. The scene then shifts into the enclosed arcade, where a roof provides shelter from the rain and the lighting is dominated by bright orange cafe signs and illuminated shop windows. Finally, the environment becomes more intimate and crowded as the player moves deeper into the commercial corridor among browsing pedestrians.
